title: Pan-Seared Cauliflower Paella
description: A twist on the classic Spanish dish, using fresh Australian cauliflower. This recipe is a hearty and flavorful vegetarian option.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garden peppers and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Add the garlic cloves and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the cauliflower and cook for 5 minutes, until tender.
Add the rice and stir to combine with the vegetables.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Serve hot, garnished with lemon wedges if desired.
